title: galearis rotundifolia f. immaculata
intro: Galearis rotundifolia f. immaculata, also known as the round-leaved orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The round-leaved orchid is also said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
